etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "jovial" + "-ity" from Latin "Jovialis" (of Jupiter, planet of joy)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Jupiter joy state; having good-humored cheerfulness and joviality good-humor with cheerful presence
